source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/04_G1717CW 외 7종/90_규격 Test report/1. 신청서 및 제출서류/11. 부품인증서_사양서 (추가 자료는 제품 검토 후 요청)/POE Injector/EMC/JAT24041102618EC-2 CE-EMC证书 EN 55032 EN 55035 EN 61000-3-2 EN 61000-3-3 POE供电器.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Certificate of Conformity No. JAT24041102618EC-2 for SDAPO POE injector models tested for EMC Directive 2014/30/EU compliance.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports CE EMC conformity documentation when read with the full test report JAT24041102618ER-2.
keyPoints: Applicant and manufacturer are SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
Equipment under test is a POE injector with SDAPO trade mark.
The submitted sample was found to comply with Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU.
Compliance standards listed include EN 55032, EN 55035, EN IEC 61000-3-2, and EN 61000-3-3.
The certificate states it is based on evaluation of one sample and does not imply assessment of production.

entities.name: SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Applicant : SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer : SDAPO Communication Co., Ltd.

entities.name: Dongguan Jun'an Testing & Certification Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Without the written approval of Dongguan Jun'an Testing & Certification Co., Ltd., this certificate is not permitted to be reproduced, except in full.

concepts.name: Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU
concepts.evidence: The submitted sample of the above equipment has been tested and found to comply with the following European Directive: Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU

evidence.claim: The equipment under test is a POE injector under the SDAPO trade mark.
evidence.evidenceText:
EUT : POE injector
Trade Mark : SDAPO

evidence.claim: The certificate covers models PSE30, PSE801, PSE30G, PSE801G, PSE30TG, PSE802G, PSE60G, PSE156G, PSE90G, and POE4805.
The submitted sample was tested and found to comply with the Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU.
evidence.evidenceText: The submitted sample of the above equipment has been tested and found to comply with the following European Directive: Electromagnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU

evidence.claim: The associated test report number is JAT24041102618ER-2.
The certificate is part of the full test report and should be read with it.
evidence.evidenceText: This certificate is part of the full test report(s) and should be read in conjunction with it.

evidence.claim: The certificate is based on evaluation of one sample and does not imply assessment of production.
evidence.evidenceText: This certificate is based on an evaluation of one sample of above mentioned product. It does not imply assessment of the production of the product.
